description: Public-safe documentation, roadmap, trust, and integration surface for ANCAP.

branchProtection.statusChecksNote: Enable once the public docs repo has its own CI workflow.

notes: Keep the repo docs-first and public-safe.
Do not add private deploy secrets or operator-only automations.
If GitHub Projects is unavailable for the target owner/account plan, keep the board documented and defer the live project without blocking repo creation.
